name: Alex Rivera
description: MCP tool configuration for Full Stack Engineer — Dispatch Core squad

github.notes: Use for: reading code across repos, searching for usages, creating PRs against feature/* branches only

postgres.notes: Staging DB only — read-only. Never connect to production DB URL. Use for: schema inspection, EXPLAIN ANALYZE, query testing.

filesystem.notes: Scoped to fsm-platform monorepo. Denied paths include secrets and infrastructure.

brave-search.notes: Use for: searching documentation for Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ, Apollo Server

usage_guidance.github: Search for existing patterns before writing new code. Use to read the job_assignment module before suggesting changes.
usage_guidance.postgres: Always use staging DB. Run EXPLAIN ANALYZE before recommending query changes on dispatch_jobs or technician_locations.
usage_guidance.filesystem: Read source files to understand existing patterns before generating new code.
usage_guidance.brave-search: Look up official docs for external libraries — do not rely on training data alone for version-specific APIs.
